data.title: ETN Eternal Protocol Ecological Token is about to be launched
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, ETN Eternal Protocol Ecological Token will be launched on PancakeSwap at 15:00 on April 7th to start trading.
It is reported that ETN is the ecological token of the Snowball AI Intelligent Trading System jointly launched by Singapore Yutian Capital and Snowball Intelligent Trading Laboratory. ETN combines the DeepSeek large model with multi-dimensional technical analysis to achieve intelligent arbitrage in the encrypted digital currency market.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: BTC holders need to learn to love tariffs, maybe we finally break the correlation with Nasdaq
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arthur Hayes wrote on the X platform that BTC holders need to learn to love tariffs. Maybe we finally broke the connection with Nasdaq and can become the purest "smoke alarm" of fiat currency liquidity.

data.title: Sui Lianchuang responded to Paradigm CTO: I have believed that there are problems with Solidity and EVM since 2018
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Paradigm CTO Georgios Konstantopoulos posted on the X platform that there are problems with the current state of Solidity, questioning whether to continue to improve Solidity, turn to Vyper, or develop new languages, or even consider a RISCV runtime based on Rust.
In response, Sui co-founder said that he was curious about why Paradigm CTO's views changed after long-term participation in Solidity ecosystem and tool development, and said that he had believed that there were problems with Solidity and EVM since 2018, but he had not seen any new events that changed his views recently.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Suggests Bitcoin May Break Free from Nasdaq Correlation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Arthur Hayes recently expressed on social media that Bitcoin holders should embrace tariff policies, suggesting that Bitcoin might finally break free from its correlation with the Nasdaq. Hayes believes Bitcoin could become the ultimate indicator of fiat liquidity.

The comments come after a significant downturn in the U.S. stock market. The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed down by 2231 points, the S&P 500 fell by 5.97%, and the Nasdaq dropped by 5.82%. The Dow has retreated more than 10% from its record closing high, entering a correction phase, while the Nasdaq has fallen over 20%, marking a bear market.

In contrast, Bitcoin experienced a relatively stable day, with a fluctuation range of only 3%, ultimately closing with gains on the daily chart.

data.title: PayPal Expands Cryptocurrency Offerings with Chainlink and Solana
data.description: According to PANews, PayPal has announced that users of PayPal and Venmo can now directly purchase, hold, sell, and transfer the cryptocurrencies Chainlink (LINK) and Solana (SOL) within their accounts. This move expands PayPal's cryptocurrency offerings, providing users with more options for digital asset transactions.

data.title: EigenLayer will launch the Slashing mechanism function on April 17
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: EigenLayer announced that it will officially launch the long-awaited slashing mechanism on April 17, marking the first time that the protocol has achieved full functionality. This mechanism allows the AVS service built on EigenLayer to punish nodes that do not meet the standards, improving security and credibility. (CoinDesk)

data.title: P2P.me Completes $2 Million Seed Round, with Multicoin and Coinbase Ventures Participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency to fiat currency payment application P2P.me announced the completion of a $2 million seed round of financing, with investors including Multicoin and Coinbase Ventures. P2P.me uses a network of middlemen to enable users to use stablecoins to pay merchants who only accept fiat currencies, and the transaction process takes about 90 seconds. The platform uses zero-knowledge proof technology to verify user identity and ensure privacy and security. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Tether Considers New Stablecoin Amid U.S. Regulatory Challenges
data.description:
According to PANews, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino has expressed that he is not concerned about the potential ban of USDT in the United States due to new regulatory measures. Tether is actively exploring the creation of a new stablecoin registered in the U.S. that will comply with forthcoming American stablecoin regulations. Ardoino emphasized the need for two products with distinct value propositions, suggesting that USDT is more suitable for emerging markets and may not maintain its dominance in the U.S. and Europe in the future.

Under current regulations, both the U.S. House of Representatives and Senate require foreign stablecoin issuers like Tether, headquartered in El Salvador, to adhere to the Bank Secrecy Act's stringent anti-money laundering requirements and undergo rigorous audits of their reserves. Tether, a stablecoin giant with a market capitalization of $144 billion, has never undergone a comprehensive financial audit. Critics and competitors argue that if Tether is forced to comply with complex anti-terrorism and anti-money laundering rules, it might completely withdraw from the U.S. market. Over the years, there have been persistent doubts about whether Tether has the financial backing to support each USDT token.

data.title: Meta to invest nearly $1 billion in Wisconsin data center to power AI
data.description:
Meta Platforms Inc. plans to invest nearly $1 billion in a data center project in central Wisconsin.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/meta-to-invest-1-b-in-wisconsin/

data.title: A whale transferred out 9.03 million IMX again, and sold a total of 26.2 million in the past 9 days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember's monitoring, a whale transferred out 9.03 million IMX again. He first deposited the tokens into FalconX and then entered Binance from FalconX.
In the past 9 days, a total of 26.2 million tokens were sold, worth $13.72 million.
